Headline: Stephanie Chernikowski
Description: Stephanie Chernikowski (1941–2026) was an American photographer and writer. She documented the New York City punk and new wave scenes of the 1970s and 1980s.[1][2]

Headline: Matthew 28:18
Description: Matthew 28:18 is the eighteenth verse of the twenty-eighth chapter of the Gospel of Matthew in the New Testament. This verse is part of the Great Commission narrative, containing the emphatic declaration of Jesus' absolute authority over the universe.

Headline: 116th Infantry Regiment (United States)
Description: The 116th Infantry Regiment is an infantry regiment in the Virginia Army National Guard.

Headline: Fayette (community), Wisconsin
Description: Fayette is an unincorporated community located in the town of Fayette, Lafayette County, Wisconsin, United States.[1] Deriving its name from Lafayette County, the post office was established in August 1849 with Martin W. Anderson as the first postmaster.[2]

Headline: Água Clara
Description: Água Clara is a municipality located in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul. Its population was 15,776 (2020) and its area is 11,031 km2 (4,259 sq mi).
